summary: Tested invoice (fatura) feature on CheckoutPage. All 6 test scenarios passed: toggle closed by default, opens invoice form, bireysel fields visible, kurumsal fields visible on switch, validation errors for empty bireysel fields, validation errors for empty kurumsal fields.

test_results.checkout_page_loads: PASS - /odeme accessible without login, invoice-toggle visible
test_results.invoice_toggle_default_off: PASS - invoice form fields hidden by default
test_results.invoice_toggle_opens_form: PASS - clicking invoice-toggle shows invoice fields
test_results.bireysel_fields_visible: PASS - invoice-name and invoice-tc visible when bireysel selected
test_results.kurumsal_fields_visible: PASS - invoice-company, invoice-tax-office, invoice-tax-no visible on kurumsal
test_results.bireysel_validation: PASS - Error: 'Bireysel fatura için ad soyad ve TC kimlik no zorunludur.'
test_results.kurumsal_validation: PASS - Error: 'Kurumsal fatura için firma adı, vergi dairesi ve vergi no zorunludur.'

context_for_next_testing_agent: Invoice feature fully working. All data-testid attributes present: invoice-toggle, invoice-type-bireysel, invoice-type-kurumsal, invoice-name, invoice-tc, invoice-company, invoice-tax-office, invoice-tax-no. Backend InvoiceInfo model and OrderCreate.invoice field are in place.
